name: Hazardous_Mechs

sections.intro:
TheHazardous Mechsare one of theSquadsfromInto The Breach. They consist of theLeap Mech,Unstable MechandNano Mechand are unlockable for 4 coins.
This squad has obscene damaging abilities as the Leap and Unstable mechs both have powerful pushing weapons. However, everything comes with the price of dealing self-damage, relying on the Nano Mech'sA.C.I.D. Projectorand its signature passiveViscera Nanobotsto stay fighting.
sections.Strategies:
- Keep your Nano Mech alive at all times, and your other two mechs are virtually immortal. Viscera Nanobots will heal a mech even if its health would be reduced to zero or lower, includingSelf-Destruct. This ability doesn't account for negative numbers, so if your mech's health has been reduced to a negative number, the game will just treat mech's HP as 0 and heal the according amount of HP.For example, if your Unstable Mech has 1HP, has Upgrade I powered and kills two enemies in one attack, it will have 2HP after the attack resolution.
  - The A.C.I.D projector is key to killing high-health targets such as theFireflywith the Unstable Mech.
  - All of this squad's weapons push enemies, so beware of inside corners, particularly where one of the obstacles is a city or allied unit, and either occupy them with your own mechs or prevent enemies from moving into them.
  - Get the +1 Heal upgrade on Viscera Nanobots first before any other damage upgrades.
  - If Advanced Equipment is enabled,Networked Shieldingfully negates any self-damage and voids the purpose of Viscera Nanobots.
  - Recommended starting pilots include:Mafancan use the Zoltan Shield each turn to absorb self-damage, and can use the included reactor core to immediately power +1 damage each.Abe Isamuprevents the initial 1 point of self damage from Hydraulic Legs and Unstable Cannon, allowing you to get their +1 damage each upgrades early.To a lesser extent,Ariadne's +3HP can tank the self-damage and can also get the +1 damage each upgrades early, provided she gets kill-shots to auto-repair some of the lost HP.
  - Other pilots to look out for include:Any pilot withConservativeif you have Self-Destruct.Chen RongandArchimedes: Lets you move one of your mechs after attacking, which is important as the Leap Mech likes to enter into enemy fire. Also helps the Nano Mech escape trouble.Silica: Lets the Leap Mech hop twice before actually moving.Morgan Lejeune: Lets you keep the boost in case Viscera Nanobots does not fully heal, which is often the case after getting health upgrades.Rosie Rivets: can pilot the Nano Mech and be positioned to repair and revive the other two mechs, decreasing the squad's reliance on Viscera Nanobots.

full_text:
Hazardous Mechs
“
These Mechs have spectacular damage output but rely on nanobots feeding off dead Vek to stay alive.
„
The
Hazardous Mechs
are one of the
Squads
from
Into The Breach
. They consist of the
Leap Mech
,
Unstable Mech
and
Nano Mech
and are unlockable for 4 coins.
This squad has obscene damaging abilities as the Leap and Unstable mechs both have powerful pushing weapons. However, everything comes with the price of dealing self-damage, relying on the Nano Mech's
A.C.I.D. Projector
and its signature passive
Viscera Nanobots
to stay fighting.

Flying
: Flying units can move over any terrain tile.
Achievements
[
]
Healing
Heal 10 Mech Health in a single battle.
Immortal
Finish 4 Corporate Islands without a Mech being destroyed at the end of a battle.
Overkill
Deal 8 damage to a unit with a single attack.
Strategies
[
]
Keep your Nano Mech alive at all times, and your other two mechs are virtually immortal. Viscera Nanobots will heal a mech even if its health would be reduced to zero or lower, including
Self-Destruct
. This ability doesn't account for negative numbers, so if your mech's health has been reduced to a negative number, the game will just treat mech's HP as 0 and heal the according amount of HP.
For example, if your Unstable Mech has 1HP, has Upgrade I powered and kills two enemies in one attack, it will have 2HP after the attack resolution.
The A.C.I.D projector is key to killing high-health targets such as the
Firefly
with the Unstable Mech.
All of this squad's weapons push enemies, so beware of inside corners, particularly where one of the obstacles is a city or allied unit, and either occupy them with your own mechs or prevent enemies from moving into them.
Get the +1 Heal upgrade on Viscera Nanobots first before any other damage upgrades.
If Advanced Equipment is enabled,
Networked Shielding
fully negates any self-damage and voids the purpose of Viscera Nanobots.
Recommended starting pilots include:
Mafan
can use the Zoltan Shield each turn to absorb self-damage, and can use the included reactor core to immediately power +1 damage each.
Abe Isamu
prevents the initial 1 point of self damage from Hydraulic Legs and Unstable Cannon, allowing you to get their +1 damage each upgrades early.
To a lesser extent,
Ariadne
's +3HP can tank the self-damage and can also get the +1 damage each upgrades early, provided she gets kill-shots to auto-repair some of the lost HP.
Other pilots to look out for include:
Any pilot with
Conservative
if you have Self-Destruct.
Chen Rong
and
Archimedes
: Lets you move one of your mechs after attacking, which is important as the Leap Mech likes to enter into enemy fire. Also helps the Nano Mech escape trouble.
Silica
: Lets the Leap Mech hop twice before actually moving.
Morgan Lejeune
: Lets you keep the boost in case Viscera Nanobots does not fully heal, which is often the case after getting health upgrades.
Rosie Rivets
: can pilot the Nano Mech and be positioned to repair and revive the other two mechs, decreasing the squad's reliance on Viscera Nanobots.
